case_title: W & D WHOLESALE FOODS, INC VS. JM & ASSOCIATES, INC et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF W & D WHOLESALE FOODS, INC AS TO DEFENDANT SIU, JACK

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,259.54 FILED BY W & D WHOLESALE FOODS, INC AS TO DEFENDANT JM & ASSOCIATES, INC DBA GOGO CAFE & RESTAURANT SIU, JACK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-13-2010 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
REMARK: FILE IS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED ON MAY-26-2026.
